name: Public Joint-Stock Company Rusgrain Holding
summary: Public Joint-Stock Company Rusgrain Holding cultivates, processes, stores, and trades in agricultural products in Russia and internationally. It offers a range of agricultural products, such as poultry products, dairy products, and cereals. The company also operates poultry farms; processes poultry meat in sausages, smoked meats, delicacies, and semi-finished products; and offers chicken eggs and broiler meat. It operates under the Avdon and Turbaslinsky Broiler brand names. In addition, the company produces and supplies feed to poultry farms. Public Joint-Stock Company Rusgrain Holding was founded in 2004 and is based in Ufa, Russia.
